meta.note: AI-assembled content using standard, well-attested Wolof vocabulary (greetings, numbers, family, food, colors, common verbs, days, everyday phrases). Vocabulary is not placeholder/fake, but native-speaker review is still recommended before wide launch, especially for the items flagged 'review' below (spelling variants, register, and dialectal differences are common in Wolof).
